subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God, the Possessor of Names, unto the people of Bahá who speak not except that which hath been uttered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله مالک الاسماء لاهل البهاء الذین لایتکلمون الا بما نطق
subcodes.subjects: @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @prayer for forgiveness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @chastisement and requital
